detectors.description:
Reentrancy in GoBuyInu._transfer(address,address,uint256) (GoBuyInu.sol#663-787):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (GoBuyInu.sol#727)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (GoBuyInu.sol#801-813)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (GoBuyInu.sol#733)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (GoBuyInu.sol#821)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (GoBuyInu.sol#785)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (GoBuyInu.sol#947)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (GoBuyInu.sol#927)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (GoBuyInu.sol#929)
	GoBuyInu._rOwned (GoBuyInu.sol#333) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- GoBuyInu._takeTeam(uint256) (GoBuyInu.sol#941-949)
	- GoBuyInu._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (GoBuyInu.sol#901-937)
	- GoBuyInu.balanceOf(address) (GoBuyInu.sol#489-493)
	- GoBuyInu.constructor() (GoBuyInu.sol#423-453)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (GoBuyInu.sol#785)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (GoBuyInu.sol#955)
	GoBuyInu._rTotal (GoBuyInu.sol#347) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- GoBuyInu._getCurrentSupply() (GoBuyInu.sol#1097-1107)
	- GoBuyInu._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (GoBuyInu.sol#953-959)
	- GoBuyInu.constructor() (GoBuyInu.sol#423-453)
	- GoBuyInu.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (GoBuyInu.sol#585-607)

		- [_rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount)](GoBuyInu.sol#L929)
	[GoBuyInu._rOwned](GoBuyInu.sol#L333) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [GoBuyInu._takeTeam(uint256)](GoBuyInu.sol#L941-L949)
	- [GoBuyInu._transferStandard(address,address,uint256)](GoBuyInu.sol#L901-L937)

	- [GoBuyInu.constructor()](GoBuyInu.sol#L423-L453)
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](GoBuyInu.sol#L785)
		- [_rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee)](GoBuyInu.sol#L955)
	[GoBuyInu._rTotal](GoBuyInu.sol#L347) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [GoBuyInu._getCurrentSupply()](GoBuyInu.sol#L1097-L1107)
	- [GoBuyInu._reflectFee(uint256,uint256)](GoBuyInu.sol#L953-L959)
